caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his arm is recorded in a studio with a dark, sound-absorbing foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a black logo that reads "Stay lunatic". A professional silver microphone on a black boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the clip, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing as his expression shifts slightly. He begins by looking forward and slightly to the left, then shifts his gaze further to the right in the later frames. His head moves subtly as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
